parasos.title: SOS
parasos.subtitle: Neighborhood Emergency Aid

groups.title: Safety Groups
groups.empty_subtitle: Create the first safety group in your neighborhood
groups.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? This cannot be undone.

create_group.title: Create Safety Group
create_group.visibility_public_desc: Discoverable in Nearby, anyone can join
create_group.group_type_local_desc: Tied to a location on the map
create_group.location_hint: Drag the map to set the center point
create_group.wot_required: Requires WoT level 2+ to create groups

member.emergency_context_hint: Medical info, allergies, doctor contacts — only visible during active SOS
member.login_to_join: Sign in to join this group

sos.already_active: You already have an active alert

errors.invite_invalid: This invite link is invalid or expired

invite.title: Invite Links
invite.private_group_hint: This is a private group. Share this invite link with people you want to add

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.no_tracking: This system does NOT track members' locations
privacy.sos_only: Location is shared ONLY when you press the SOS button
privacy.no_history: No location history is stored for responders

disclaimer.title: Important
disclaimer.not_police: This is NOT a replacement for police or emergency services
disclaimer.no_obligation: Members are NOT obligated to respond
disclaimer.no_intervention: Do NOT physically intervene — observe and report
disclaimer.call_112: In case of real emergency, always call 112

parasos.docs_passive_inactivity_desc: Tracks activity via IoT/HA sensors (motion, door, fridge). Auto-sends WARNING if no activity for configurable hours. Ideal for elderly living alone.
parasos.docs_passive_iot_desc: Smoke detectors, motion sensors, door contacts can automatically send SOS alerts via webhook. No manual button press needed.
parasos.docs_passive_checkin_desc: Simple daily button for elderly as alternative to IoT sensors. One tap resets the inactivity timer.
parasos.docs_passive_autoresolve_desc: Alerts active for more than 2 hours without response are automatically resolved to keep the system clean.
parasos.landing_meta: Free community-driven emergency mutual aid system. Press one button — your neighbors arrive in 2 minutes. Faster than any police or security company.
parasos.landing_hero_subtitle: Press one button — everyone in your safety group gets an instant alert with your location. No monthly fees. No middlemen. Just neighbors helping neighbors.
parasos.landing_problem_1: Police take 20+ minutes to arrive in rural areas. Thieves need only 10.
parasos.landing_problem_2: Security companies charge 30-50 EUR/month and just call the police for you.
parasos.landing_problem_3: Your friends and family live far away and can't help when it matters most.
parasos.landing_feature_1_desc: One tap sends push notifications with siren sound to all group members. No app to open, no number to dial.
parasos.landing_feature_2_desc: Your neighbor 300m away arrives in 2-5 minutes. Faster than any police or security company.
parasos.landing_feature_3_desc: Neighbors come physically. Family members in other cities get notified and call emergency services with full context.
parasos.landing_feature_4_desc: No intervention required. Just the presence of observers deters 90% of opportunistic crimes.
parasos.landing_feature_5_desc: No background GPS. Your location is shared ONLY when you press the SOS button. Responder locations are never stored.
parasos.landing_feature_6_desc: IoT sensors detect if grandma hasn't moved since morning. Family gets notified instantly — even from another city. Daily "I'm OK" button as simple alternative.
parasos.landing_feature_7_desc: Your group is invisible to outsiders. Members join only via invite link. Perfect for family or close friends who live far apart.
parasos.landing_feature_8_desc: Press volume down 3 times without taking out your phone. Full-screen alarm with siren that overrides silent mode. Wakes neighbors even at 3 AM.
parasos.landing_how_1: Create a safety group for your neighborhood and invite your neighbors.
parasos.landing_how_2: When you need help, press the SOS button. Everyone gets an instant alert.
parasos.landing_how_3: Neighbors respond — you see who's seen it, who's coming, who's on site.
parasos.landing_free_desc: ParaSOS is free, open source, and built for communities. No corporate middlemen, no monthly fees — just people helping people.
